title: Dense fog conditions likely to prevail in Delhi, Punjab, Haryana, Uttar Pradesh & Rajasthan - News On AIR
search_term: heatwave (Karaikal OR Mahe OR Pondicherry OR Yanam) Puducherry
full_text:
India Meteorological Department (IMD) has forecast that dense fog conditions are very likely to prevail in isolated pockets of Punjab, Haryana-Chandigarh-Delhi, Uttar Pradesh and Rajasthan today.
Similar weather conditions are expected over Madhya Pradesh, Sub-Himalayan West Bengal and Sikkim till tomorrow and in Assam, Meghalaya, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram and Tripura till the 21st of this month. The IMD said that cold day conditions are very likely in isolated pockets of Madhya Pradesh.
The weather department also forecasts heavy rainfall at isolated places over Tamil Nadu, Puducherry, Karaikal, Kerala and Mahe. Thunderstorms accompanied with gusty winds are also very likely at isolated places over Kerala and Mahe with lightning at isolated places over Tamil Nadu, Puducherry and Karaikal today.
The IMD added that squally weather with a wind speed of 35 kilometres per hour to 45 kilometres per hour is likely to prevail over the Comorin area and the adjoining gulf of Mannar. Fishermen are advised not to venture into these areas.
